headlines.headline: Jorval Trading Co sees mixed results in digital payments pilot program

sentiment.reasoning: Mixed results in a pilot program create ambiguity regarding future revenue potential and operational success.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
